ead.archdesc:
======= RMM06956National Alliance on Mental Illness - Finger Lakes Records6956Compiled by RMC StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
June 20112B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
socscThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 19:00:37 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
National Alliance on Mental Illness - Finger Lakes Records
National Alliance on Mental Illness - Finger Lakes
6956
4.0 cubic feet. 4.0 cubic feet.
1985-2010. Printed Materials Educational and publicity materials and files on meetings and activities of FLAMI and NAMI-Finger Lakes. Collection material in English 7248890
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
June 2011
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, June 2011
Date modified:
RMC Staff, June 2011
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
Under the name Finger Lakes Alliance on Mental Illness (FLAMI) since 1985 and National Alliance on Mental Illness (NAMI)- Finger Lakes since it incorporated as a 501c organization in 2006, this group has organized support for and education about having family members and friends with mental illness.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Educational and publicity materials and files on meetings and activities of FLAMI and NAMI-Finger Lakes, arranged basically chronologically, with audiocassettes and ephemera separate at the end.
Cite As:
National Alliance on Mental Illness - Finger Lakes Records, #6956. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Mental health services -- Finger Lakes Region (N.Y.) Mental disorders -- Finger Lakes Region (N.Y.) Mental illness -- Finger Lakes Region (N.Y.) Finger Lakes Alliance on Mental Illness
